violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk case 1. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2024
The cabinet above the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the milk/dairy cold hold unit observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Both kitchen staff and Dietitian have SerSafe Applications for Food Safety Manger were provided at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in cabinet under food prep sink, chemical cabinet and under prep table along wall with windows. No food contact surface areas were observed to be affected. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment shall call pest control to assess the kitchen. Establishment shall clean and sanitize affected areas. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
